    Mapping-tree parser

    parse_mapping.Rd

    This function parses the tree returned by reading the yaml mapping file, and returns a named list of the contents of the current level passed as the argument. The function is recursive, and will descend through the configuration, generating a tree of documentation, database and table information that acts like a logical database.

    Usage

    parse_mapping(mapping, srv, source_database = NULL, source_table = NULL)

    Arguments

    mapping

    A named list storing a level of the yaml config file

    srv

    The Databases object with the underlying connection

    source_database

    The name of the source database for the current level

    source_table

    The name of the source table for the current level

    Value

    A named list containing the results of parsing the file

    On this page
